description: NASA Image and Video Library CLI: search, download, and extract from 140k+ public-domain NASA images, videos, and audio assets

tools.name: albums_get
tools.description: Return paginated asset listing for a curated album. Album names are case-sensitive (Apollo-at-50 works, apollo-at-50 returns 404). Required: album_name. Optional: page (default: 1).

params.name: album_name
params.description: Curated album name, case-sensitive (discover names via search results' data.album field)

params.name: page
params.description: 1-indexed page number; page_size is fixed by the server (~100) for albums.

tools.name: assets_get
tools.description: Return the list of every file URL for an asset. Required: nasa_id.

params.name: nasa_id
params.description: Asset's NASA ID (from a search result's data.nasa_id field, e.g. PIA12348 or as11-40-5874)

tools.name: captions_get
tools.description: Return the location URL of the captions file. Video assets only — 400 for images, 404 for video without captions. Use `captions fetch` (novel command) to follow the indirection and fetch the caption text. Required: nasa_id.

params.name: nasa_id
params.description: Asset's NASA ID (video media_type only)

tools.name: media_list
tools.description: Search the catalog by free text or filters. At least one query parameter is required. Optional: q, media_type, year_start (plus 12 more).

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text query terms matched against indexed metadata (title, description, keywords). Any one search parameter satisfies the API; omit q to filter by media_type/center/year only.

params.name: media_type
params.description: Filter by media type. Use comma-separated values for OR: image,video

params.name: year_start
params.description: Earliest date_created year (YYYY format, e.g. 2020)

params.name: year_end
params.description: Latest date_created year (YYYY format, e.g. 2026)

params.name: center
params.description: NASA center code that published the media. One of HQ, JSC (Johnson), KSC (Kennedy), GSFC (Goddard), JPL (Jet Propulsion), MSFC (Marshall), ARC (Ames), LRC (Langley), AFRC (Armstrong), GRC (Glenn), SSC (Stennis). Comma-separated for OR.

params.name: photographer
params.description: Primary photographer's name

params.name: secondary_creator
params.description: Secondary photographer or videographer

params.name: keywords
params.description: Comma-separated keyword terms (matched against the indexed keyword set)

params.name: location
params.description: Matched against the asset's Location field

params.name: description
params.description: Matched against the asset's Description field

params.name: description_508
params.description: Matched against the asset's Section-508 accessibility description

params.name: title
params.description: Matched against the asset's Title field

params.name: nasa_id
params.description: Exact match on a specific NASA ID. Returns at most one item.

params.name: page
params.description: 1-indexed page number for pagination

params.name: page_size
params.description: Items per page. Practical max ~200; defaults to 100.

tools.name: metadata_get
tools.description: Return the location URL of the metadata.json sidecar for an asset. Use `metadata fetch` (novel command) to follow the indirection and fetch the cleaned metadata content. Required: nasa_id.

params.name: nasa_id
params.description: Asset's NASA ID
